title: selaginella geniculata subsp. conduplicata
intro: Selaginella geniculata subsp. conduplicata, also known as the forked spike moss, is a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even show potential in treating certain types of cancer. The forked spike moss can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
